get.description: Retrieve a list of all academic year records.

200.description: The list of academic year records was retrieved successfully. The list may be empty.

500.description: An unexpected internal database error occurred while fetching the academic year records.

201.description: The academic year was successfully created.

400.description: Malformed request syntax. failed to parse the JSON payload for the academic year.

409.description: A database conflict occurred (e.g., a unique constraint or foreign key violation) while saving the academic year.

422.description: The academic year payload is valid JSON but failed semantic validation (e.g., missing fields).

500.description: An unexpected internal database or server error occurred while creating the academic year.

get.description: Retrieve a specific academic year by its unique identifier.

200.description: The requested academic year was retrieved successfully.

400.description: The provided ID in the URL path is invalid or cannot be parsed as an integer.

404.description: A academic year with the specified ID was not found in the database.

500.description: An unexpected internal database or server error occurred while retrieving the academic year.

put.description: Update an existing academic year by its unique identifier.

204.description: The academic year was updated successfully. No content is returned.

400.description: The ID in the path is invalid, or the JSON payload syntax is malformed.

404.description: The academic year requested for update was not found in the database.

409.description: A database conflict occurred (e.g., a unique constraint or foreign key violation) while updating the academic year.

422.description: The update payload for the academic year failed semantic validation.

500.description: An unexpected internal database error occurred while attempting to update the academic year.

delete.description: Permanently delete a academic year by its unique identifier.

204.description: The academic year was deleted successfully. No content is returned.

400.description: The provided ID in the URL path is invalid or cannot be parsed.

404.description: The academic year requested for deletion was not found in the database.

409.description: Cannot delete the academic year because it is currently referenced by other records (Foreign Key Violation).

500.description: An unexpected internal database error occurred while attempting to delete the academic year.

get.description: An experemental api, for filtering result of getall, this api will replace the current get /table_name/ for all tables, all parameters are queries(url?a=b&c=d) and are optional , string type accept sql like synthax %aze% , ge mean greater equal <=, le mean less equal >=

200.description: Requested academic years retrieved successfully with all filter applied, Could be empty
